stories.title: Spurs 103-82 Thunder — WCF Game 4, Series Tied 2-2
stories.angle: Wembanyama's halftime buzzer beater — the longest Spurs playoff make since tracking began in 2014 — was the moment that broke Oklahoma City's spirit. This series is now anyone's game.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
WEMBY: 33 POINTS. 8 REBOUNDS. 3 BLOCKS.

And a 40-FOOT BUZZER BEATER at halftime.

Spurs 103, Thunder 82. WCF tied 2-2.

San Antonio just changed everything.

#HoopHeroes #Spurs #NBAPlayoffs

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
SGA: 19 pts on 6-of-15 shooting.
OKC: 33% from the field. 18% from three.

Wembanyama was EVERYWHERE. Castle. Fox. Vassell.

The Thunder got blown out. Series tied 2-2. G5 tomorrow in OKC.

#HoopHeroes #Thunder #NBAPlayoffs

article.headline: Wembanyama 33 Points and a Half-Court Buzzer Beater: Spurs Blowout Thunder 103-82, WCF Tied 2-2

stories.title: ECF Game 4 TONIGHT — Knicks vs. Cavaliers, Cleveland, 8 PM ET ABC
stories.angle: The greatest comeback in NBA history vs. the greatest team performance in recent Knicks memory. Tonight decides which narrative wins.

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
TONIGHT. Cleveland. 8 PM ET. ABC.

Knicks lead ECF 3-0. One win from the NBA Finals.

No team has EVER come back from 3-0.

Can the Cavs survive or do the Knicks celebrate in Ohio?

#HoopHeroes #Knicks #NBAPlayoffs

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
ECF Game 4 tips off in 1 hour. Knicks -2.5. Series 3-0.

Mitchell needs to be ELITE. Harden needs to show up.

One Knicks win = first NBA Finals since 1999.

8 PM ET. ABC. Cleveland.

#HoopHeroes #Cavaliers #NBAPlayoffs

article.headline: Knicks vs. Cavaliers — ECF Game 4 Preview: New York One Win From First Finals Since 1999

stories.title: Wembanyama's Half-Court Buzzer Beater — The Shot That Broke OKC
stories.angle: The shot will be replayed all summer. It's already a defining moment of the 2026 playoffs.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Three dribbles. Center court. 40 feet.

BANG.

Wembanyama's halftime buzzer beater is the longest Spurs playoff make since 2014.

This is why the 2026 playoffs are unforgettable.

#HoopHeroes #Spurs #NBAPlayoffs

article.headline: The Shot That Broke OKC: Wembanyama's 40-Foot Buzzer Beater Is Already a Playoff Legend

stories.title: WCF Game 5 Preview — Thunder Must Respond at Home
stories.angle: Games 5 through 7 territory. Home-court matters more now than at any point in this series.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
WCF Game 5. TOMORROW. OKC. 8:30 PM ET. NBC/Peacock.

Thunder -5.5 at home. Series tied 2-2.

SGA must bounce back from 6-of-15. OKC crowd needs to show up.

This series just got interesting.

#HoopHeroes #Thunder #NBAPlayoffs

stories.title: ECF Game 4 Storylines — Harden's Moment of Truth
stories.angle: Harden has one game to define his 2026 playoff legacy. Perform tonight or watch the Knicks celebrate at Rocket Mortgage FieldHouse.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
James Harden: 1-of-8 from three in Game 3. 6 turnovers in Game 1.

The Cavs are 3-0 down and HARDEN is the reason why.

Tonight is his last chance to flip the script.

8 PM ET. ABC. Cleveland.

#HoopHeroes #Cavaliers #NBAPlayoffs

article.headline: Harden's Moment of Truth: The Key to Cleveland's Season in ECF Game 4
